name: Dune: Awakening RPG
description: Hey guys! So, this one is based off of the Dune: Awakening game. Not the movie or books, the Game. I have included the Five Classes as well and have also included the mechanisms for the temperature, Hydration and also, the Sandworms, well, I tried to. So, if it doesn't work, please do reach out and tell me about it in the comments and leave your reviews. I'll write more in the description when I'm free. Have fun!
creator: InfernoPyro
